onboarding_write.step1.title: Controls
onboarding_write.step1.desc: Clear the canvas with the cross, undo or redo strokes with the arrows, and send your note with the checkmark.
onboarding_write.step2.title: Drawing area
onboarding_write.step2.desc: Draw with your finger or mouse. For more precision, a stylus works wonders. Pinch or scroll to zoom in and work on the details.
onboarding_write.step3.title: Zoom
onboarding_write.step3.desc: When zoomed in, this button shows the current zoom level. Tap it to return to the full view.
onboarding_write.step4.title: Color
onboarding_write.step4.desc: Tap here to open the color palette.
onboarding_write.step5.title: The palette
onboarding_write.step5.desc: Pick from the preset colors to customize your stroke.
onboarding_write.step6.title: Brush size
onboarding_write.step6.desc: 4 brush sizes available, from finest to largest.
